layouts.name: LINE group options default table
layouts.propertyOrderRule: The listed properties are the only visible table columns and must appear in this order.
notes: Project-specific database IDs and data source IDs must remain outside AMCore.
If a project is missing 候選來源權責項目, add it as a project-local relation to that project's responsibility database before applying the view layout.

layouts.name: Total-control tasks default table
layouts.propertyOrderRule: Keep the project's existing useful task-control columns, but do not show 來源原文 in the default table header.
notes: 來源原文 remains a project-local database property for backward compatibility and audit fallback.
Primary task evidence should be recorded in the task page body so the table header can stay compact.
Do not drop or delete the 來源原文 property unless the project owner explicitly approves data removal.
